subject: [PATCH 1/8] nfsd: defer vfree of compound ops to fix rpc_status UAF

2026-06-01.patch_summary: This patch fixes a use-after-free bug in the NFSv4 server by deferring the freeing of compound operation buffers until after an RCU grace period. The rpc_status netlink dumpit walks in-flight requests and reads opnums from these buffers, but the buffers are freed synchronously before the dumpit has finished reading them. By using kvfree_rcu_mightsleep() instead of vfree(), the patch ensures that the buffers persist in memory until after an RCU grace period, preventing a use-after-free bug.
